home.title: Dropuz | Your study content, active all day on WhatsApp
home.description: Send the material you're studying - text, audio, image or PDF. Dropuz practices with you throughout the day, on WhatsApp. Free to start.
home.keywords: english practice whatsapp, study english whatsapp, study agent, continuous practice, Dropuz

phrases.0: Just learned a new English word. Where do you write it down?
phrases.1: Heard a new expression in a show. Gone with the episode.
phrases.3: Wrote it on paper. The paper disappeared.
phrases.4: Ten new words this week. How many do you remember?
phrases.5: Left class with three new expressions. Where are they now?

home.microcopy: Opens on WhatsApp · Free · No sign-up

who.title: For those who study English for real.
who.subtitle: No matter how you learn. Dropuz fits the way you do it.

0.title: The self-taught learner
0.description: Learns from YouTube, shows, podcasts. Has material everywhere and nothing organized. Dropuz practices with you based on what you already have.

1.title: The course student
1.description: Takes classes but never reviews outside them. Send the class material and Dropuz practices with you all day on the WhatsApp you already use.

2.title: The professional
2.description: Uses English at work but freezes on specific vocabulary. Send content from your context and practice throughout the day.

3.title: The binge-watcher
3.description: Pauses, writes down the expression, keeps watching. Dropuz turns what you captured into practice throughout the day.

4.title: The traveler
4.description: About to travel or already abroad. Send everyday vocabulary, real situations and slang - and practice before you need it.

5.title: The one who tried and quit
5.description: Already tried Anki, Duolingo, Quizlet. Got tired of opening yet another app. Dropuz works inside the WhatsApp you already open fifty times a day.

pricing.title: Start now, free and no sign-up needed.
pricing.subtitle: Use for free and upgrade when you're ready.
pricing.description: Free to start: up to 5 notes per day and 3 tags. On the Pro plan for R$14.90/month you get 30 daily notes, unlimited tags, transcribed audio and search across everything you've saved.

features_demo.title: That simple.
features_demo.subtitle: From new vocabulary to daily review. One message does it.

0.title: Send anything. It's saved.
0.description: Text or transcribed audio. Any message becomes a note with no extra steps.

chat.text: shadow of a doubt - without any doubt #english
bite the bullet - face something difficult #english #idioms

1.title: Use # to organize.
1.description: Your notes organized by category. Send # to see all tags or #tag to list the notes inside.

chat.text:
*#phrasal - 18 notes:*
- run into - come across by chance
- give up - stop trying
- keep up - maintain the pace
- and 15 more

2.title: Search by word. Results instantly.
2.description: No need to remember the tag or when you saved it. Send /search and Dropuz finds it across all your notes.

chat.text:
*2 notes found:*
- shadow of a doubt - without any doubt
- beyond doubt - without question
